name: Seifu Issa Seif
title: Data Science Finalist @ EASTC University
bio: Transforming data into decisions. I combine statistical thinking with modern machine learning tools to uncover patterns and drive impact.
about: I am Seifu Issa Seif, a final year Data Science student at EASTC University with registration number EASTC/BDTS/24/01611. I am passionate about solving real-world problems through data.

projects.title: Malaria Outbreak Prediction
projects.description: Built a predictive model to forecast malaria outbreaks in Tanzania using climate data, population density, and historical case records.

projects.title: E-Commerce Recommendation Engine
projects.description: Developed a collaborative filtering recommendation system to suggest products to users based on their purchase and browsing history.

projects.title: Road Accident Analysis Tanzania
projects.description: Analyzed road accident data across Tanzania to identify high-risk zones and time patterns using statistical methods and geospatial mapping.

projects.title: Student Dropout Prediction
projects.description: Created a classification model to predict student dropout risk at university level using academic and socioeconomic features.

education.institution: Eastern Africa Statistical Training Centre (EASTC), Tanzania
